impact: This unblocks the public source inventory validator sequence by proving malformed Python is rejected before broader unittest discovery or fixture validation resumes.
summary: Adds a narrow syntax-first public source inventory repair test and a minimal importable contract module.
target_task: Task checkbox-64: Add a one-file syntax-first repair test for public source inventory validation that imports only `ppd.contracts.public_source_inventory` and rejects malformed Python before broad unittest discovery.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
